source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager - B2B SaaS
source_jobs.description:
About Pirros

Pirros is building the intelligence layer for design production. We are fundamentally reshaping how architecture and engineering firms manage project knowledge and technical design details.

Our platform is an AI-powered hub purpose-built for the AECO industry. We help architects, engineers, and contractors streamline detail management to improve consistency, minimize errors, and accelerate project delivery timelines.

We are establishing the system of record for design production in a global $12T+ market that has been underserved by modern software for far too long.


WHY JOIN PIRROS

 - Backed by top-tier investors including YC, Funders Club, PlanGrid, and Elephant

 - Profitable growth with $7M+ ARR and 10% month-over-month expansion

 - Recently secured a $17M Series A in 2025

 - Over 350 active firms, including many of the leading AEC organizations nationwide

 - Industry-leading 120% net revenue retention (NRR)

 - Founding team with deep roots in the structural engineering industry

 - Comprehensive compensation including salary, equity, full benefits, and unlimited PTO

 - A culture defined by high trust, autonomy, and a team of experienced operators

 - The chance to solve high-impact problems for the professionals designing our physical world


ABOUT THE ROLE

The Customer Success Manager owns the post-sale customer relationship at Pirros. This person makes sure Pirros customers are successfully onboarded, trained, engaged, and continuously seeing value from the product.

This is not a reactive support role. The CSM is a trusted advisor, account owner, and internal customer advocate. They monitor account health, identify risks early, drive adoption, surface expansion opportunities, and work cross-functionally to resolve customer issues with urgency.

As Pirros continues to grow, Customer Success is critical to retention, expansion, and turning customers into long-term Pirros advocates.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own a book of Pirros B2B SaaS customers as their main post-sale point of contact

 - Lead Pirros onboarding, training, deployment, and ongoing adoption

 - Build strong customer relationships and understand each account’s goals, workflows, and success criteria

 - Monitor Pirros account health using usage data, customer feedback, engagement, and support trends

 - Identify churn risk early and create clear action plans to improve adoption and satisfaction

 - Drive proactive customer touchpoints, check-ins, business reviews, and adoption campaigns

 - Partner with Sales to support renewals, expansion opportunities, and long-term account growth

 - Work with Product, Support, and Engineering to resolve customer issues, bugs, and escalations

 - Translate customer feedback into clear internal signal for Product and leadership

 - Help customers understand new Pirros features, best practices, and ways to get more value from the platform

 - Turn happy customers into advocates, references, case studies, and promoters


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Customer retention and account health — Pirros customers renew because they are engaged and seeing value

 - Onboarding and adoption — customers are trained, activated, and using Pirros successfully

 - Risk management — risks are identified early, escalated appropriately, and resolved with urgency

 - Expansion signal — opportunities for growth are surfaced and shared with Sales

 - Customer feedback loop — Product and leadership understand what Pirros customers need, love, and struggle with

 - Customer advocacy — satisfied customers become long-term Pirros champions


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in B2B SaaS Customer Success, Account Management, or Implementation

 - Proven ability to manage customer relationships across onboarding, adoption, retention, and expansion

 - Strong communication skills, both written and verbal

 - Highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple accounts and priorities at once

 - Strong pro

source_jobs.title: Member Technical Staff - Full Stack
source_jobs.description:
About Pirros

We are building Intelligence for design production and reshaping how architecture and engineering firms manage design details and project knowledge.

Pirros is an AI-powered project hub purpose-built for architects and engineers. Our platform helps AECO professionals - architects, engineers, contractors, and owners - streamline detail management, improve consistency, reduce errors, and accelerate project delivery.

We’re building the system of record for design production in a $12T+ industry that has long been underserved by modern software and workflows.

 

Why Join Pirros

 - Backed by leading investors including YC, Funders Club, PlanGrid, and Elephant

 - Profitable business with $7M+ ARR and growing 10% month-over-month

 - Closed a $17M Series A in 2025

 - 350+ firms actively using Pirros today, including some of the top AEC firms in the country

 - 120% net revenue retention

 - Founders come directly from the structural engineering industry

 - Competitive compensation package - salary, equity, unlimited PTO, and full benefits

 - High-trust, high-autonomy culture with experienced builders and operators

 - Opportunity to solve meaningful problems for the people designing the world around us
   
   

What You’ll Own:

 - Design, build, and maintain full-stack web applications used by our customers every day translate requirements into clean, scalable solutions

 - Own features end-to-end, from technical design to production deployment

 - Write high-quality, maintainable, well-tested code

 - Improve performance, reliability, and usability across the stack

 - Contribute to architecture decisions and help shape our technical direction

 - Debug complex issues in production and implement long-term fixes

 - Continuously raise the engineering bar through code reviews and technical discussions
   
    

What We’re Looking For:

 - Expertise working across the stack (frontend, backend, APIs, infrastructure)

 - Strong experience with React, JavaScript / TypeScript, and modern frontend tooling

 - Solid understanding of system design, scalability, and performance

 - Strong debugging and problem-solving skills

 - Ability to take ownership of projects with minimal oversight

 - Strong code quality standards and attention to detail

Who You Are:

 - You ship production code quickly without sacrificing quality

 - You take ownership of problems instead of waiting for direction

 - You simplify complex systems instead of adding unnecessary complexity

 - You care about the customer experience, not just the code

 - You help make the entire engineering team stronger
   
    

Pirros believes diverse perspectives and experiences make both our product and culture stronger. We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity or expression, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.

Pirros is committed to fair and equitable compensation. Compensation packages are determined based on experience, skills, qualifications, and performance, and include salary, equity, and benefits.

source_jobs.title: QA Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Pirros

We are building Intelligence for design production and reshaping how architecture and engineering firms manage design details and project knowledge.

Pirros is an AI-powered project hub purpose-built for architects and engineers. Our platform helps AECO professionals - architects, engineers, contractors, and owners - streamline detail management, improve consistency, reduce errors, and accelerate project delivery.

We’re building the system of record for design production in a $12T+ industry that has long been underserved by modern software and workflows.

 

Why Join Pirros

 - Backed by leading investors including YC, Funders Club, PlanGrid, and Elephant

 - Profitable business with $7M+ ARR and growing 10% month-over-month

 - Closed a $17M Series A in 2025

 - 350+ firms actively using Pirros today, including some of the top AEC firms in the country

 - 140% net revenue retention

 - Founders come directly from the structural engineering industry

 - Competitive compensation package - salary, equity, unlimited PTO, and full benefits

 - High-trust, high-autonomy culture with experienced builders and operators

 - Opportunity to solve meaningful problems for the people designing the world around us

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Own manual testing for new features, bug fixes, and product releases.

 - Create and execute clear test plans, test cases, and regression testing processes.

 - Perform functional, exploratory, integration, and end-to-end testing across the product.

 - Test frontend workflows, APIs, integrations, authentication, permissions, and data accuracy.

 - Partner closely with Engineering, Product, Design, and Customer Success to identify risks and edge cases early.

 - Reproduce, document, and track bugs with clear steps, expected behavior, and supporting details.

 - Validate bug fixes and ensure changes do not introduce regressions.

 - Help improve QA processes, release readiness standards, and overall product quality.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience manually testing web-based software products.

 - Strong understanding of QA methodologies, test planning, regression testing, and exploratory testing.

 - Experience testing frontend applications, APIs, integrations, and complex user workflows.

 - Strong attention to detail and ability to identify edge cases and inconsistencies.

 - Ability to use browser developer tools, inspect network activity, and troubleshoot issues with engineers.

 - Experience with bug-tracking and test-management tools.

 - Strong communication and documentation skills.

 - Ability to work independently, prioritize testing efforts, and operate effectively in a fast-paced startup environment.

 - Familiarity with modern web applications built with technologies such as JavaScript, TypeScript, and React is a plus.
   
    

Who You Are:

 - You think like a customer, not just a tester and catch issues before they become customer problems

 - You take ownership of quality across the entire development lifecycle

 - You can work in ambiguity and bring structure where processes are still evolving

 - You are comfortable challenging assumptions and asking the right questions early

 - You care deeply about building a product that is reliable, intuitive, scalable, and trusted by customers
   
    

Pirros believes diverse perspectives and experiences make both our product and culture stronger. We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity or expression, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.

Pirros is committed to fair and equitable compensation. Compensation packages are determined based on experience, skills, qualifications, and performance, and include salary, equity, and benefits.

notes: AI-powered project hub for AECO industry, building system of record for design production
